bpu=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bps][bnq[bpt]]=bnq[bpu];else if bnz<=185 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bpv=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bpw=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bpx=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bpv]=bnq[bpw][bnq[bpx]];else bnq[(bnb[bkl]-bnb[bkn])]=#bnq[bnb[bko]];end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][2][3] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bpy=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bpz=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bpy]=bnq[bpz];else bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bqa=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bqb=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bqc=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bqa]=bnq[bqb][bnq[bqc]];end end else if bnz<=180 then if bnz<=bjr[1][50][4] then if bnz<=bjr[1][69][4] then local bqd=bnb[bkl] local bqe=bnb[bko] local bqf=bnb[bkm] bnq[bqd[1]]=bkf[bqe[1]];bnq[bqd[2]]=bnq[bqe[2]][bnq[bqf[2]]];else local bqg=bnb[bkl] local bqh=bnb[bko] local bqi=bnb[bkm] bnq[bqg[1]]=bju[bkf[bqh[1]]];bnq[bqg[2]]=bkf[bqh[2]];bnq[bqg[3]]=bnq[bqh[3]][bnq[bqi[3]]];bnq[bqg[4]]=bju[bkf[bqh[4]]];end else if bnz<=179 then local bqj=bnb[bkl] local bqk=bnb[bko] bnq[bqj[1]]=bju[bkf[bqk[1]]];bnq[bqj[2]]=bkf[bqk[2]];else bnq[(bnb[bkl]-bnb[bkn])]=bnq[bjr[1][58][7](bnb[bko],bjr[1][58][7](bkc[bnd-1][bko],(bnd+bnb[bkn])))];end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][48][1] then if bnz>=bjr[1][48][1] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bql=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bqm=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bqn=bqm bnq[bql]=bjt[bqn] else local bqo=bnb[bkl] local bqp=bnb[bko] local bqq=bjr[1][58][7](bqp[2],bnd+bjr[1][104][8]) local bqr=bjr[1][58][7](bqp[3],bqq) bnq[bqo[1]]=bkf[bqp[1]];bnq[bqo[2]]=bkf[bqp[2]];bnq[bqo[3]]=bnq[bqr];bnq[bqo[4]]=bkf[bqp[4]];end else if bnz<=183 then local bqs=bnb[bkl] local bqt=bnb[bko] bnq[bqs[1]]=bju[bkf[bqt[1]]];bnq[bqs[2]]=bkf[bqt[2]];else local bqu=bnb[bkl] local bqv=bnb[bko] bnq[bqu[1]]=bju[bkf[bqv[1]]];bnq[bqu[2]]=bkf[bqv[2]];end end end end else if bnz<=168 then if bnz>=bjr[1][81] then if bnz>=bjr[1][15][5] then if bnz>=168 then local bqw=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bkf[bnb[bko]];bnq[bqw[bkl]]=bnq[bqw[bko]][bnq[bqw[bkm]]];bnd=bnd+1 else local bqx=bnb[bkl] bno=bnq[bqx[1]] bno=#bno end else if bnz<=bjr[1][81] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bqy=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bqz=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bqy]=bnq[bqz];else local bra=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bkf[bnb[bko]];bnq[bra[bkl]]=bnq[bra[bko]]>bnq[bra[bkm]];bnd=bnd+1 end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][48][3] then if bnz>=bjr[1][48][3] then local brb=#bnb[bkl];for brc=1,brb do bnq[bnb[bkl][brc]]=bkf[bnb[bko][brc]];end else local brd=bkc[bnd][bkl] local bre=bkc[bnd][bko] local brf=bkc[bnd][bkm] local brg=bnq[bre] local brh=bnq[brf] bnq[brd]=brg(brh) end else if bnz>=164 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bri=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local brj=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local brk=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bri]=bnq[brj][bnq[brk]];else bne=bkf[bkc[bnd+bjr[1][10][7]][bko]] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bkf[bnb[bko]];end end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][4][1] then if bnz<=bjr[1][89][7] then if bnz>=bjr[1][89][7] then local brl=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];bnq[brl[bkl]]=bkf[brl[bko]];bnd=bnd+1 else local brm=bnb[bkl] local brn=bnb[bko] local bro=bnb[bkm] bnq[brm[1]]=bnq[brn[1]][bnq[bro[1]]];bnq[brm[2]]=bju[bkf[brn[2]]];bnq[brm[3]]=bkf[brn[3]];bnq[brm[4]]=bnq[brn[4]][bnq[bro[4]]];end else if bnz>=bjr[1][4][1] then local brp=bnb[bkl] local brq=bnb[bko] local brr=bnb[bkn] bnq[brp[1]]=bnq[brq[1]];bnq[brp[2]]=bkf[brq[2]];local brs=brp[3] local brt=bkf[brr[3]] local bru=bnq[brs] while bjr[1][3][7] do bnq[brs]=bru[brt](bru,bnq[brs+bjr[1][22][7]]) break end else local brv=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=nil;bnq[brv[bkl]]=bnq[brv[bko]]~=bnq[brv[bkm]];bnd=bnd+1 end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][66][6] then if bnz>=bjr[1][26][5] then local brw=bnb[bkl] bno=bnq[brw[1]] bno=#bno else local brx=bnb[bkl] local bry=bnb[bko] local brz=bjr[1][58][7](bry[3],bnd+164) local bsa=bjr[1][58][7](bry[4],brz) bnq[brx[1]]=bno bnq[brx[2]]={};bnq[brx[3]]=bkf[bry[3]];bnq[brx[4]]=bnq[bsa];end else if bnz<=173 then local bsb=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnq[bnb[bko]];local bsc=bsb[bkl] local bsd=bkf[bsb[bkn]] local bse=bnq[bsc] local bsf=bse[bsd] bnq[bsc]=bsf(bse) bnd=bnd+1 else local bsg=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bkf[bnb[bko]];bnq[bsg[bkl]]=bnq[bsg[bko]]~=bnq[bsg[bkm]];bnd=bnd+1 end end end end end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][49][5] then if bnz>=209 then if bnz>=217 then if bnz<=220 then if bnz>=bjr[1][101][6] then if bnz>=220 then local bsh=bnb local bsi=bsh[bkl][1] local bsj=bsh[bkm][1] local bsk,bsl,bsm=bnq[bsi],bnq[bsi+1],bnq[bsi+bjr[1][22][7]] while bsk<=bsl do bnq[bsi]=bsk bnq[bsi+bjr[1][10][7]]=bsk bnq[bsh[bkl][2]]=bnq[bsh[bko][2]][bnq[bsh[bkm][2]]] bnq[bsh[bkl][3]]=bnq[bsh[bko][3]] bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][4]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bsh[bkl][6]] bnq[bsh[bkl][7]]=bkf[bsh[bko][7]] bnq[bsh[bkl][8]]=bnq[bsh[bko][8]]-bnq[bsh[bkm][8]] bnq[bsh[bkl][9]]=bnq[bsh[bko][9]]*bnq[bsh[bkm][9]] bnq[bsh[bkl][10]]=bkf[bsh[bko][10]] bnq[bsh[bkl][11]]=bnq[bsh[bko][11]]%bnq[bsh[bkm][11]] bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][12]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno local bsn=bsh[bkl][14] local bso=bny[bnt] local bsp=bny[bnt-1] local bsq=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bsn]=bsq(bsp,bso) bnq[bsh[bkl][15]]=bnq[bsh[bko][15]] bnq[bsh[bkl][16]]=bnq[bsh[bko][16]] bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][17]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][19]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bsh[bkl][21]] local bsr=bsh[bkl][22] local bss=bny[bnt] local bst=bny[bnt-1] local bsu=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bsr]=bsu(bst,bss) bnq[bsh[bkl][23]]=bnq[bsh[bko][23]]-bnq[bsh[bkm][23]] bnq[bsh[bkl][24]]=bkf[bsh[bko][24]] bnq[bsh[bkl][25]]=bnq[bsh[bko][25]]%bnq[bsh[bkm][25]] bnq[bsh[bkl][26]]=bnq[bsh[bko][26]] bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][27]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][29]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bsh[bkl][31]] local bsv=bsh[bkl][32] local bsw=bny[bnt] local bsx=bny[bnt-1] local bsy=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bsv]=bsy(bsx,bsw) bnq[bsh[bkl][33]]=bnq[bsh[bko][33]] bnq[bsh[bkl][34]]=bnq[bsh[bko][34]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bsh[bkl][35]] bno=bnq[bsh[bkl][36]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno local bsz=bsh[bkl][38] local bta=bny[bnt] local btb=bny[bnt-1] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][22][7] bnq[bsz]=btb(bta) bnq[bsh[bkl][39]]=bnq[bsh[bko][39]]..bnq[bsh[bkm][39]] bsk=bsk+bsm end bnq[bsi]=bsk bnd=bsh[bko][1] else local btc=bnb local btd=btc[bkl][1] local bte=btc[bkm][1] local btf,btg,bth=bnq[btd],bnq[btd+1],bnq[btd+bjr[1][22][7]] while btf>=btg do bnq[btd]=btf bnq[btd+bjr[1][10][7]]=btf bnq[btc[bkl][2]]=bkf[btc[bko][2]] bnq[btc[bkl][3]]=bnq[btc[bko][3]]-bnq[btc[bkm][3]] bnq[btc[bkl][4]]=bnq[btc[bko][4]]*bnq[btc[bkm][4]] bnq[btc[bkl][5]]=bnq[btc[bko][5]]%bnq[btc[bkm][5]] bnq[btc[bkl][6]]=bkf[btc[bko][6]] bnq[btc[bkl][7]]=bnq[btc[bko][7]]+bnq[btc[bkm][7]] bnq[btc[bkl][8]]=bnq[btc[bko][8]][bnq[btc[bkm][8]]] bnq[btc[bkl][9]]=bnq[btc[bko][9]][bnq[btc[bkm][9]]] bnq[btc[bkl][10]][bnq[btc[bko][10]]]=bnq[btc[bkm][10]] bnq[btc[bkl][11]][bnq[btc[bko][11]]]=bnq[btc[bkm][11]] btf=btf+bth end bnq[btd]=btf bnd=btc[bko][1] end else if bnz>=bjr[1][4][5] then local bti=bnb local btj=bti[bkl][1] local btk=bti[bkm][1] local btl,btm,btn=bnq[btj],bnq[btj+1],bnq[btj+bjr[1][22][7]] while btl<=btm do bnq[btj]=btl bnq[btj+bjr[1][10][7]]=btl bnq[bti[bkl][2]]=bnq[bti[bko][2]][bnq[bti[bkm][2]]] bnq[bti[bkl][3]][bnq[bti[bko][3]]]=bnq[bti[bkm][3]] btl=btl+btn end bnq[btj]=btl bnd=bti[bko][1] else local bto=bnb local btp=bto[bkl][1] local btq=bto[bkm][1] local btr,bts,btt=bnq[btp],bnq[btp+1],bnq[btp+bjr[1][22][7]] while btr>=bts do bnq[btp]=btr bnq[btp+bjr[1][10][7]]=btr bnq[bto[bkl][2]]=bkf[bto[bko][2]] bnq[bto[bkl][3]]=bnq[bto[bko][3]]-bnq[bto[bkm][3]] bnq[bto[bkl][4]]=bnq[bto[bko][4]]*bnq[bto[bkm][4]] bnq[bto[bkl][5]]=bnq[bto[bko][5]]%bnq[bto[bkm][5]] bnq[bto[bkl][6]]=bkf[bto[bko][6]] bnq[bto[bkl][7]]=bnq[bto[bko][7]]+bnq[bto[bkm][7]] bnq[bto[bkl][8]]=bnq[bto[bko][8]][bnq[bto[bkm][8]]] bnq[bto[bkl][9]]=bnq[bto[bko][9]][bnq[bto[bkm][9]]] bnq[bto[bkl][10]][bnq[bto[bko][10]]]=bnq[bto[bkm][10]] bnq[bto[bkl][11]][bnq[bto[bko][11]]]=bnq[bto[bkm][11]] btr=btr+btt end bnq[btp]=btr bnd=bto[bko][1] end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][99] then if bnz>=bjr[1][49][5] then bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bjr[1][89][6](bnq[bnb[bko]],bnq[bnb[bkm]]);else local btu,btv=bnb[bkl],(bnb[bkm]*bjr[1][38][6]) local btw=bnq[btu] if not(((bjr[1][89][9]) and(bjr[1][89][8]))) then else do local btx,bty,btz=bnq[btu+1],bnq[btu+bjr[1][22][7]],bnq[btu+bjr[1][10][7]] btw[btv+1]=btx btw[btv+bjr[1][22][7]]=bty btw[btv+bjr[1][10][7]]=btz end end end else if bnz<=221 then local bua=bnb local bub=bua[bkl][1] local buc=bua[bkm][1] local bud,bue,buf=bnq[bub],bnq[bub+1],bnq[bub+bjr[1][22][7]] while bud<=bue do bnq[bub]=bud bnq[bub+bjr[1][10][7]]=bud bnq[bua[bkl][2]]=bnq[bua[bko][2]][bnq[bua[bkm][2]]] bnq[bua[bkl][3]][bnq[bua[bko][3]]]=bnq[bua[bkm][3]] bud=bud+buf end bnq[bub]=bud bnd=bua[bko][1] else local bug=bnb local buh=bug[bkl][1] local bui=bug[bkm][1] local buj,buk,bul=bnq[buh],bnq[buh+1],bnq[buh+bjr[1][22][7]] while buj>=buk do bnq[buh]=buj while bjr[1][76] do bnq[buh+bjr[1][10][7]]=buj break end bnq[bug[bkl][2]]=bkf[bug[bko][2]] bnq[bug[bkl][3]]=bnq[bug[bko][3]]-bnq[bug[bkm][3]] bnq[bug[bkl][4]]=bnq[bug[bko][4]]*bnq[bug[bkm][4]] bnq[bug[bkl][5]]=bnq[bug[bko][5]]%bnq[bug[bkm][5]] bnq[bug[bkl][6]]=bkf[bug[bko][6]] bnq[bug[bkl][7]]=bnq[bug[bko][7]]+bnq[bug[bkm][7]] bnq[bug[bkl][8]]=bnq[bug[bko][8]][bnq[bug[bkm][8]]] bnq[bug[bkl][9]]=bnq[bug[bko][9]][bnq[bug[bkm][9]]] bnq[bug[bkl][10]][bnq[bug[bko][10]]]=bnq[bug[bkm][10]] bnq[bug[bkl][11]][bnq[bug[bko][11]]]=bnq[bug[bkm][11]] buj=buj+bul end bnq[buh]=buj bnd=bug[bko][1] end end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][3][3] then if bnz<=bjr[1][78] then if bnz<=bjr[1][3][3] then local bum=bnb local bun=bum[bkl][1] local buo=bum[bkm][1] local bup,buq,bur=bnq[bun],bnq[bun+1],bnq[bun+bjr[1][22][7]] while bup<=buq do bnq[bun]=bup bnq[bun+bjr[1][10][7]]=bup bnq[bum[bkl][2]]=bnq[bum[bko][2]] bnq[bum[bkl][3]]=bnq[bum[bko][3]] bnq[bum[bkl][4]]=bnq[bum[bko][4]] local bus=bum[bkl][5] local but=bkf[bum[bkn][5]] local buu=bnq[bus] bnq[bus]=buu[but](buu,bnq[bus+bjr[1][22][7]],bnq[bus+bjr[1][10][7]]) bnq[bum[bkl][6]]=bkf[bum[bko][6]] bnq[bum[bkl][7]]=bnq[bum[bko][7]]==bnq[bum[bkm][7]] if bnq[bum[bkl][8]] then bnq[bum[bkl][10]]=bkf[bum[bko][10]] bnq[bum[bkl][11]]=bkf[bum[bko][11]] bnq[bum[bkl][12]]=bnq[bum[bko][12]]-bnq[bum[bkm][12]] bnq[bum[bkl][13]]=bnq[bum[bko][13]]^bnq[bum[bkm][13]] else end if bnq[bum[bkl][14]] then else bnq[bum[bkl][16]]=bkf[bum[bko][16]] end bnq[bum[bkl][17]]=bnq[bum[bko][17]]+bnq[bum[bkm][17]] bup=bup+bur end bnq[bun]=bup bnd=bum[bko][1] else bnq[(bnb[bko]+bnb[bkn])][bnq[bnb[bkm]]]=bnq[bnb[bkl]];end else if bnz<=bjr[1][54][5] then local buv=bnb local buw=buv[bkl][1] local bux=buv[bkm][1] local buy,buz,bva=bnq[buw],bnq[buw+1],bnq[buw+bjr[1][22][7]] while buy>=buz do bnq[buw]=buy bnq[buw+bjr[1][10][7]]=buy bnq[buv[bkl][2]]=bkf[buv[bko][2]] bnq[buv[bkl][3]]=bnq[buv[bko][3]]-bnq[buv[bkm][3]] bnq[buv[bkl][4]]=bnq[buv[bko][4]]*bnq[buv[bkm][4]] bnq[buv[bkl][5]]=bnq[buv[bko][5]]%bnq[buv[bkm][5]] bnq[buv[bkl][6]]=bkf[buv[bko][6]] bnq[buv[bkl][7]]=bnq[buv[bko][7]]+bnq[buv[bkm][7]] bnq[buv[bkl][8]]=bnq[buv[bko][8]][bnq[buv[bkm][8]]] bnq[buv[bkl][9]]=bnq[buv[bko][9]][bnq[buv[bkm][9]]] bnq[buv[bkl][10]][bnq[buv[bko][10]]]=bnq[buv[bkm][10]] bnq[buv[bkl][11]][bnq[buv[bko][11]]]=bnq[buv[bkm][11]] buy=buy+bva end bnq[buw]=buy bnd=buv[bko][1] else local bvb=bnb local bvc=bvb[bkl][1] local bvd=bvb[bkm][1] local bve,bvf,bvg=bnq[bvc],bnq[bvc+1],bnq[bvc+bjr[1][22][7]] while bjr[1][66][4] do while bve<=bvf do bnq[bvc]=bve bnq[bvc+bjr[1][10][7]]=bve bnq[bvb[bkl][2]]=bnq[bvb[bko][2]][bnq[bvb[bkm][2]]] bnq[bvb[bkl][3]][bnq[bvb[bko][3]]]=bnq[bvb[bkm][3]] bve=bve+bvg end break end bnq[bvc]=bve bnd=bvb[bko][1] end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][19][2] then if bnz>=bjr[1][19][2] then local bvh=bnb local bvi=bvh[bkl][1] local bvj=bvh[bkm][1] local bvk,bvl,bvm=bnq[bvi],bnq[bvi+1],bnq[bvi+bjr[1][22][7]] while bjr[1][94][1] do while bvk>=bvl do bnq[bvi]=bvk bnq[bvi+bjr[1][10][7]]=bvk bnq[bvh[bkl][2]]=bkf[bvh[bko][2]] bnq[bvh[bkl][3]]=bnq[bvh[bko][3]]^bnq[bvh[bkm][3]] bnq[bvh[bkl][4]]=bnq[bvh[bko][4]]%bnq[bvh[bkm][4]] bnq[bvh[bkl][5]]=bkf[bvh[bko][5]] bnq[bvh[bkl][6]]=bnq[bvh[bko][6]]-bnq[bvh[bkm][6]] bnq[bvh[bkl][7]]=bnq[bvh[bko][7]]^bnq[bvh[bkm][7]] bnq[bvh[bkl][8]]=bnq[bvh[bko][8]]%bnq[bvh[bkm][8]] bnq[bvh[bkl][9]]=bnq[bvh[bko][9]]-bnq[bvh[bkm][9]] bnq[bvh[bkl][10]]=bkf[bvh[bko][10]] bnq[bvh[bkl][11]]=bnq[bvh[bko][11]]>bnq[bvh[bkm][11]] if bnq[bvh[bkl][12]] then bnq[bvh[bkl][14]]=bkf[bvh[bko][14]] else end if bnq[bvh[bkl][15]] then else bnq[bvh[bkl][17]]=bkf[bvh[bko][17]] end bnq[bvh[bkl][18]]=bnq[bvh[bko][18]]..bnq[bvh[bkm][18]] bvk=bvk+bvm end break end bnq[bvi]=bvk bnd=bvh[bko][1] else local bvn=bnb local bvo=bvn[bkl][1] local bvp=bvn[bkm][1] local bvq,bvr,bvs=bnq[bvo],bnq[bvo+1],bnq[bvo+bjr[1][22][7]] while bvq<=bvr do bnq[bvo]=bvq bnq[bvo+bjr[1][10][7]]=bvq bnq[bvn[bkl][2]]=bnq[bvn[bko][2]][bnq[bvn[bkm][2]]] bnq[bvn[bkl][3]][bnq[bvn[bko][3]]]=bnq[bvn[bkm][3]] bvq=bvq+bvs end bnq[bvo]=bvq bnd=bvn[bko][1] end else if bnz>=212 then local bvt=bnb local bvu=bvt[bkl][1] local bvv=bvt[bkm][1] local bvw,bvx,bvy=bnq[bvu],bnq[bvu+1],bnq[bvu+bjr[1][22][7]] local bvz,bwa local bwb,bwc while bvw>=bvx do bnq[bvu]=bvw bnq[bvu+bjr[1][10][7]]=bvw bnq[bvt[bkl][2]]=bkf[bvt[bko][2]] bnq[bvt[bkl][3]]=bnq[bvt[bko][3]]^bnq[bvt[bkm][3]] bnq[bvt[bkl][4]]=bnq[bvt[bko][4]]%bnq[bvt[bkm][4]] bnq[bvt[bkl][5]]=bkf[bvt[bko][5]] bnq[bvt[bkl][6]]=bnq[bvt[bko][6]]-bnq[bvt[bkm][6]] bnq[bvt[bkl][7]]=bnq[bvt[bko][7]]^bnq[bvt[bkm][7]] bnq[bvt[bkl][8]]=bnq[bvt[bko][8]]%bnq[bvt[bkm][8]] bnq[bvt[bkl][9]]=bnq[bvt[bko][9]]-bnq[bvt[bkm][9]] bnq[bvt[bkl][10]]=bkf[bvt[bko][10]] bnq[bvt[bkl][11]]=bnq[bvt[bko][11]]>bnq[bvt[bkm][11]] if not(((bjr[1][106][6]) and(bjr[1][106][2]))) then else if bnq[bvt[bkl][12]] then if not bwa then bvz=bkf[bvt[bko][14]] bwa=true end bnq[bvt[bkl][14]]=bvz else end end if bnq[bvt[bkl][15]] then else if not bwc then bwb=bkf[bvt[bko][17]] bwc=true end bnq[bvt[bkl][17]]=bwb end bnq[bvt[bkl][18]]=bnq[bvt[bko][18]]..bnq[bvt[bkm][18]] bvw=bvw+bvy end bnq[bvu]=bvw bnd=bvt[bko][1] else local bwd=bnb local bwe=bwd[bkl][1] local bwf=bwd[bkm][1] local bwg,bwh,bwi=bnq[bwe],bnq[bwe+1],bnq[bwe+bjr[1][22][7]] while bwg<=bwh do bnq[bwe]=bwg bnq[bwe+bjr[1][10][7]]=bwg bnq[bwd[bkl][2]]=bnq[bwd[bko][2]] bnq[bwd[bkl][3]]=bnq[bwd[bko][3]] bnq[bwd[bkl][4]]=bnq[bwd[bko][4]] local bwj=bwd[bkl][5] local bwk=bkf[bwd[bkn][5]] local bwl=bnq[bwj] bnq[bwj]=bwl[bwk](bwl,bnq[bwj+bjr[1][22][7]],bnq[bwj+bjr[1][10][7]]) bnq[bwd[bkl][6]]=bkf[bwd[bko][6]] bnq[bwd[bkl][7]]=bnq[bwd[bko][7]]==bnq[bwd[bkm][7]] if bnq[bwd[bkl][8]] then bnq[bwd[bkl][10]]=bkf[bwd[bko][10]] bnq[bwd[bkl][11]]=bkf[bwd[bko][11]] bnq[bwd[bkl][12]]=bnq[bwd[bko][12]]-bnq[bwd[bkm][12]] bnq[bwd[bkl][13]]=bnq[bwd[bko][13]]^bnq[bwd[bkm][13]] else end if bnq[bwd[bkl][14]] then else bnq[bwd[bkl][16]]=bkf[bwd[bko][16]] end bnq[bwd[bkl][17]]=bnq[bwd[bko][17]]+bnq[bwd[bkm][17]] bwg=bwg+bwi end bnq[bwe]=bwg bnd=bwd[bko][1] end end end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][30][4] then if bnz>=bjr[1][44] then if bnz>=bjr[1][20][3] then if bnz>=208 then local bwm=bnb local bwn=bwm[bkl][1] local bwo=bwm[bkm][1] local bwp,bwq,bwr=bnq[bwn],bnq[bwn+1],bnq[bwn+bjr[1][22][7]] while bwp>=bwq do bnq[bwn]=bwp while bjr[1][104][7] do bnq[bwn+bjr[1][10][7]]=bwp break end bnq[bwm[bkl][2]]=bkf[bwm[bko][2]] bnq[bwm[bkl][3]]=bnq[bwm[bko][3]]-bnq[bwm[bkm][3]] bnq[bwm[bkl][4]]=bnq[bwm[bko][4]]*bnq[bwm[bkm][4]] bnq[bwm[bkl][5]]=bnq[bwm[bko][5]]%bnq[bwm[bkm][5]] bnq[bwm[bkl][6]]=bkf[bwm[bko][6]] bnq[bwm[bkl][7]]=bnq[bwm[bko][7]]+bnq[bwm[bkm][7]] bnq[bwm[bkl][8]]=bnq[bwm[bko][8]][bnq[bwm[bkm][8]]] bnq[bwm[bkl][9]]=bnq[bwm[bko][9]][bnq[bwm[bkm][9]]] bnq[bwm[bkl][10]][bnq[bwm[bko][10]]]=bnq[bwm[bkm][10]] bnq[bwm[bkl][11]][bnq[bwm[bko][11]]]=bnq[bwm[bkm][11]] bwp=bwp+bwr end bnq[bwn]=bwp bnd=bwm[bko][1] else local bws=bnb local bwt=bws[bkl][1] local bwu=bws[bkm][1] local bwv,bww,bwx=bnq[bwt],bnq[bwt+1],bnq[bwt+bjr[1][22][7]] while bwv<=bww do bnq[bwt]=bwv bnq[bwt+bjr[1][10][7]]=bwv bnq[bws[bkl][2]]=bnq[bws[bko][2]][bnq[bws[bkm][2]]] bnq[bws[bkl][3]]=bnq[bws[bko][3]] bno=bnq[bws[bkl][4]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][6]] bnq[bws[bkl][7]]=bkf[bws[bko][7]] bnq[bws[bkl][8]]=bnq[bws[bko][8]]-bnq[bws[bkm][8]] bnq[bws[bkl][9]]=bnq[bws[bko][9]]*bnq[bws[bkm][9]] bnq[bws[bkl][10]]=bkf[bws[bko][10]] bnq[bws[bkl][11]]=bnq[bws[bko][11]]%bnq[bws[bkm][11]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][12]] local bwy=bws[bkl][13] local bwz=bny[bnt] local bxa=bny[bnt-1] local bxb=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bwy]=bxb(bxa,bwz) bnq[bws[bkl][14]]=bnq[bws[bko][14]] bnq[bws[bkl][15]]=bnq[bws[bko][15]] bno=bnq[bws[bkl][16]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][18]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][19]] local bxc=bws[bkl][20] local bxd=bny[bnt] local bxe=bny[bnt-1] local bxf=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bxc]=bxf(bxe,bxd) bnq[bws[bkl][21]]=bnq[bws[bko][21]]-bnq[bws[bkm][21]] bnq[bws[bkl][22]]=bkf[bws[bko][22]] bnq[bws[bkl][23]]=bnq[bws[bko][23]]%bnq[bws[bkm][23]] bnq[bws[bkl][24]]=bnq[bws[bko][24]] bno=bnq[bws[bkl][25]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bno=bnq[bws[bkl][27]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][29]] local bxg=bws[bkl][30] local bxh=bny[bnt] local bxi=bny[bnt-1] local bxj=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bxg]=bxj(bxi,bxh) bnq[bws[bkl][31]]=bnq[bws[bko][31]] bnq[bws[bkl][32]]=bnq[bws[bko][32]] bno=bnq[bws[bkl][33]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bws[bkl][35]] local bxk=bws[bkl][36] local bxl=bny[bnt] local bxm=bny[bnt-1] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][22][7] bnq[bxk]=bxm(bxl) bnq[bws[bkl][37]]=bnq[bws[bko][37]]..bnq[bws[bkm][37]] bwv=bwv+bwx end bnq[bwt]=bwv bnd=bws[bko][1] end else if bnz>=bjr[1][92][6] then local bxn=bnb local bxo=bxn[bkl][1] local bxp=bxn[bkm][1] local bxq,bxr,bxs=bnq[bxo],bnq[bxo+1],bnq[bxo+bjr[1][22][7]] while bxq<=bxr do bnq[bxo]=bxq while bjr[1][3][7] do bnq[bxo+bjr[1][10][7]]=bxq break end bnq[bxn[bkl][2]]=bnq[bxn[bko][2]][bnq[bxn[bkm][2]]] bnq[bxn[bkl][3]][bnq[bxn[bko][3]]]=bnq[bxn[bkm][3]] bxq=bxq+bxs end bnq[bxo]=bxq bnd=bxn[bko][1] else local bxt=bnb local bxu=bxt[bkl][1] local bxv=bxt[bkm][1] local bxw,bxx,bxy=bnq[bxu],bnq[bxu+1],bnq[bxu+bjr[1][22][7]] while bxw>=bxx do bnq[bxu]=bxw bnq[bxu+bjr[1][10][7]]=bxw bnq[bxt[bkl][2]]=bkf[bxt[bko][2]] bnq[bxt[bkl][3]]=bnq[bxt[bko][3]]-bnq[bxt[bkm][3]] bnq[bxt[bkl][4]]=bnq[bxt[bko][4]]*bnq[bxt[bkm][4]] bnq[bxt[bkl][5]]=bnq[bxt[bko][5]]%bnq[bxt[bkm][5]] bnq[bxt[bkl][6]]=bkf[bxt[bko][6]] bnq[bxt[bkl][7]]=bnq[bxt[bko][7]]+bnq[bxt[bkm][7]] bnq[bxt[bkl][8]]=bnq[bxt[bko][8]][bnq[bxt[bkm][8]]] bnq[bxt[bkl][9]]=bnq[bxt[bko][9]][bnq[bxt[bkm][9]]] bnq[bxt[bkl][10]][bnq[bxt[bko][10]]]=bnq[bxt[bkm][10]] bnq[bxt[bkl][11]][bnq[bxt[bko][11]]]=bnq[bxt[bkm][11]] bxw=bxw+bxy end bnq[bxu]=bxw bnd=bxt[bko][1] end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][70][2] then if bnz<=bjr[1][30][4] then local bxz=bkc[bnd+1] local bya=bkc[bnd+bjr[1][22][7]] local byb=bkc[bnd+bjr[1][10][7]] local byc=bjr[1][58][7](bya[bko],bnd+bjr[1][18]) local byd=bjr[1][58][7](byb[bko],byc) bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bno bnq[bxz[bkl]]={};bnq[bya[bkl]]=bkf[bya[bko]];bnq[byb[bkl]]=bnq[byd];bnd=bnd+bjr[1][10][7] else local bye=bnb local byf=bye[bkl][1] local byg=bye[bkm][1] local byh,byi,byj=bnq[byf],bnq[byf+1],bnq[byf+bjr[1][22][7]] while bjr[1][50][7] do while byh<=byi do bnq[byf]=byh bnq[byf+bjr[1][10][7]]=byh bnq[bye[bkl][2]]=bnq[bye[bko][2]][bnq[bye[bkm][2]]] bnq[bye[bkl][3]]=bnq[bye[bko][3]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bye[bkl][4]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bye[bkl][5]] bnq[bye[bkl][6]]=bkf[bye[bko][6]] bnq[bye[bkl][7]]=bnq[bye[bko][7]]-bnq[bye[bkm][7]] bnq[bye[bkl][8]]=bnq[bye[bko][8]]*bnq[bye[bkm][8]] bnq[bye[bkl][9]]=bkf[bye[bko][9]] bnq[bye[bkl][10]]=bnq[bye[bko][10]]%bnq[bye[bkm][10]] bno=bnq[bye[bkl][11]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno local byk=bye[bkl][13] local byl=bny[bnt] local bym=bny[bnt-1] local byn=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[byk]=byn(bym,byl) bnq[bye[bkl][14]]=bnq[bye[bko][14]] bnq[bye[bkl][15]]=bnq[bye[bko][15]] bno=bnq[bye[bkl][16]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bye[bkl][18]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bye[bkl][19]] local byo=bye[bkl][20] local byp=bny[bnt] local byq=bny[bnt-1] local byr=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[byo]=byr(byq,byp) bnq[bye[bkl][21]]=bnq[bye[bko][21]]-bnq[bye[bkm][21]] bnq[bye[bkl][22]]=bkf[bye[bko][22]] bnq[bye[bkl][23]]=bnq[bye[bko][23]]%bnq[bye[bkm][23]] bnq[bye[bkl][24]]=bnq[bye[bko][24]] bno=bnq[bye[bkl][25]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bno=bnq[bye[bkl][27]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bno=bnq[bye[bkl][29]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno local bys=bye[bkl][31] local byt=bny[bnt] local byu=bny[bnt-1] local byv=bny[bnt-bjr[1][22][7]] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][10][7] bnq[bys]=byv(byu,byt) bnq[bye[bkl][32]]=bnq[bye[bko][32]] bnq[bye[bkl][33]]=bnq[bye[bko][33]] bno=bnq[bye[bkl][34]] bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bnq[bye[bkl][36]] local byw=bye[bkl][37] local byx=bny[bnt] local byy=bny[bnt-1] bnt=bnt-bjr[1][22][7] bnq[byw]=byy(byx) bnq[bye[bkl][38]]=bnq[bye[bko][38]]..bnq[bye[bkm][38]] byh=byh+byj end break end bnq[byf]=byh bnd=bye[bko][1] end else if bnz>=bjr[1][21] then local byz=bnb local bza=byz[bkl][1] local bzb=byz[bkm][1] local bzc,bzd,bze=bnq[bza],bnq[bza+1],bnq[bza+bjr[1][22][7]] while bzc<=bzd do bnq[bza]=bzc bnq[bza+bjr[1][10][7]]=bzc bnq[byz[bkl][2]]=bnq[byz[bko][2]][bnq[byz[bkm][2]]] bnq[byz[bkl][3]][bnq[byz[bko][3]]]=bnq[byz[bkm][3]] bzc=bzc+bze end bnq[bza]=bzc bnd=byz[bko][1] else bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnq[bnb[bkm]]+bnq[bnb[bko]];end end end else if bnz<=196 then if bnz<=194 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local bzf=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bzg=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local bzh=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[bzf]=bnq[bzg][bnq[bzh]];else if bnz>=196 then local bzi=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];bnq[bzi[bkl]]=bkf[bzi[bko]];bnd=bnd+1 else local bzj=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];bnq[bzj[bkl]]=bkf[bzj[bko]];bnd=bnd+1 end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][57][1] then if bnz<=bjr[1][57][1] then local bzk=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];bnq[bzk[bkl]]=bkf[bzk[bko]];bnd=bnd+1 else local bzl=bnb[bkl] local bzm=bnb[bko] bnq[bzl[1]]=bju[bkf[bzm[1]]];bnq[bzl[2]]=bkf[bzm[2]];end else if bnz>=bjr[1][61][4] then local bzn=bkc[bnd+1] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];bnq[bzn[bkl]]=bkf[bzn[bko]];bnd=bnd+1 else local bzo=bnb[bkl] local bzp=bnb[bko] bnq[bzo[1]]=bju[bkf[bzp[1]]];bnq[bzo[2]]=bkf[bzp[2]];end end end end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][86][2] then if bnz>=bjr[1][69][3] then if bnz<=bjr[1][18] then if bnz<=bjr[1][10][1] then if bnz>=bjr[1][10][1] then bnq[bnb[bkl]]=-bnq[(bnb[bko]+bnb[bkn])];else local bzq=bnb[bko] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bjt[bzq] end else if bnz<=bjr[1][9][6] then if bnb[bko]~=bjr[1][92][1] then local bzr=bkc[bnq[bnb[bkm]]] local bzs,bzt=bzr[bko],bzr[bkl] bzr[bkl]=bzs bzr[bko]=bzt bnb[bko]=bjr[1][92][1] end else if not(((bjr[1][86][7]) and(bjr[1][86][4]))) then else if bnb[bko]~=bjr[1][39][2] then local bzu=bkc[bnq[bnb[bkn]]] local bzv,bzw,bzx=bzu[bko],bzu[bkl],bzu[bkm] bzu[bkl]=bzv bzu[bko]=bzw bzu[bkm]=bzx bnb[bko]=bjr[1][39][2] end end end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][106][5] then if bnz<=bjr[1][106][5] then if bnb[bko]~=bjr[1][49][4] then local bzy=bkc[bnq[bnb[bkn]]] local bzz,caa,cab=bzy[bkl],bzy[bkm],bzy[bko] bzy[bkl]=bzz bzy[bko]=caa bzy[bkm]=cab bnb[bko]=bjr[1][49][4] end else if bnz<=bjr[1][62][6] then bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnq[bnb[bko]];else if bnz<=257 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cac=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cad=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cae=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cac]=bnq[cad][bnq[cae]];else if bnz>=260 then if bnz>=bjr[1][7] then if bnz<=bjr[1][7] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local caf=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cag=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cah=cag bnq[caf]=bjt[cah] else if bnz<=262 then local cai=bnb[bkl] local caj=bkf[bnb[bkn]] local cak=bnq[cai] local cal=cak[caj] bnq[cai]=cal(cak) else if bnz<=bjr[1][73][4] then else if bnz<=bjr[1][34][1] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cam=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local can=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cao=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cam]=bnq[can][bnq[cao]];else if bnz<=bjr[1][15][4] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cap=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local caq=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local car=caq local cas=bjt[car] bnq[cap]=cas[1] else if bnz>=267 then if bnz<=267 then do for cat=bnv,1,-1 do local cau=bnu[cat] local cav=bni[cau] if cav then local caw=cav[1] if caw==0 then if cav[2]==bnq then cav[1]=1 cav[2]={cav[2][cav[3]]} cav[3]=1 end else if caw==bnq then cav[1]={cav[1][cav[2]]} cav[2]=1 end end end bni[cau]=nil bnu[cat]=nil end bnv=0 local cax=bnb[bko] local cay=bnt local caz=cax local cba=cay-caz+1 local cbb=bny[cba] return cbb(bjq:UN69A(bjr,bny,cba+1,cay)) end else if bnz<=268 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbc=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbd=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbc]=bnq[cbd];else if bnz<=bjr[1][83][3] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbe=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbf=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbg=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbe]=bnq[cbf][bnq[cbg]];else if bnz>=bjr[1][57][2] then if bnz<=bjr[1][57][2] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbh=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbi=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbj=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbh][bnq[cbi]]=bnq[cbj];else if bnz<=bjr[1][13][3] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbk=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbl=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbm=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbk]=bnq[cbl][bnq[cbm]];else if bnz>=276 then if bnz<=277 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbn=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbo=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbp=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbn]=bnq[cbo][bnq[cbp]];else if bnz<=bjr[1][86][3] then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbq=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbr=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbs=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bnq[cbq][bnq[cbr]]=bnq[cbs];else if bnz<=279 then bjr[17]=bnb[bkn] local cbt=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbu=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) local cbv=bjq:REC21(bjr,bjr[16]) bny[bnt]=ckw else local ckx=bnb[bko] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bjt[ckx] end else bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnq[bnb[bko]];end else if bnz>=bjr[1][49][6] then if bnz<=bjr[1][49][6] then local cky=#bnb[bkl];for ckz=1,cky do cle=(clc-cld)/bjr[1][19][5] local clf=bnb[bkn] local clg if cld>=bjr[1][22][7] then while bjr[1][92][7] do if cld>=bjr[1][10][7] then clg=((clb+cle-bnd)*clf)%bjr[1][67] else clg=((clb*cle)-(bnd*cle)+clf)%bjr[1][67] end break end else while bjr[1][83][5] do if cld<1 then clg=(clb+cle-bnd-clf)%bjr[1][67] else clg=(clb-cle+clf-bnd)%bjr[1][67] end break end end if clg>=4027 then if clg>=8111 then if clg<16057 then if clg==8111 then bnt=bnt+1 bny[bnt]=bno else bnq[cla]=bkc[clg][bnb[bkl]] bnd=bnq[cla] end else if clg==16057 then bnq[cla]=bny[bnt] bny[bnt]=nil bnt=bnt-1 else bnb=bkc[clg] bnd=bnb[bnb[bkm]] end end else local clh=bnb[bko] local cli=bjt[clh] bnq[bnb[bkl]]=cli[1] end end end end else if bnz<=bjr[1][54][6] then if bnz<=7 then if bnz<=bjr[1][15][2] then else bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnd+bnb[bko];end else if bnz>=bjr[1][54][6] then bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bnq[bnb[bko]]+bnq[bnb[bkm]];else bnq[bnb[bkl]]=bju[bkf[bnb[bko]]];end end else if bnz>=bjr[1][2][6] then local ctn,cto,ctp,ctq,ctr,cts,ctt,ctu,ctv,ctw,ctx cto={} ctp=function(cty,ctz,cua) local cub=((ctz+cua)-cty)+ctr cto[ctz*131071+ctr]=cub return cub end ctq=0 ctn=ctq ctr=ctq ctr=ctr*11+(24689) ctq=ctn+(cto[659297*131071+ctr] or ctp(871,659297,645)) ctn=ctq while ctn~=435700 do if ctn>=650008 then if ctn>=734509 then if ctn>=734509 then if ctn<=734509 then if ctn==734509 then ctn==734496 then ctu=ctv ctr=ctr*31+(-688181) ctq=ctn+(cto[-723861*131071+ctr] or ctp(2152,-723861,1451)) ctn=ctq elseif ctn==683760 then cts=csh[7]() ctr=ctr*8+(-161511) ctp(1008,488746,3776)) end elseif ctn==114026 then ctt[ctu]=csh[7]();ctr=ctr*23+(-1399399) ctn=ctn+(cto[-34566*131071+ctr] or ctp(1847,-34566,827)) else ctr=0 ctn=734509 end else if ctn==131905 then ctn>=571497 then if ctn<=571497 then if ctn==571497 then return ctt;else ctr=0 ctn=734509 end else ctr=0 ctn=734509 end else ctr=0 ctn=734509 end end end end end csh[68]=function(cuc,cud,cue) local cuf,cug,cuh,cui,cuj,cuk,cul,cum,cun,cuo,cup,cuq,cur,cus,cut,cuu,cuv,cuw,cux,cuy,cuz,cva,cvb,cvc,cvd,cve cug={} cuk={-46038,-34422,-48261,-31502,-33234,-10607,-37156,-64949,-8422,-31050,-58114,-15537,-65254,-56187,-63397,-15723,-14128,-36380,-44756,-56469,-5566,-2410,-37067,-7765,-55882,-54365,-30519,-27949,-43836,-38990,-1177,-58956,-4493,-5423,-36353,2974,2039} cuh=function(cvf) local cvg=cuk[cvf] local cvh=(cvf*935)%4096 local cvi=((cvg+cvh)-3866)+cuj cug[cvf*131071+cuj]=cvi return cvi end cui=0 cuf=cui cuj=cui cuj=cuj*14+(36995) cuf=cuf+(cug[35*131071+cuj] end,REC2E=function(dki,dkj,dkk) local dkl,dkm,dkn,dko,dkp,dkq,dkr,dks,dkt,dku dkm={} dkn=function(dkv,dkw,dkx) local dky=((dkv+dkw)-dkx)+dkp dkm[dkv*131071+dkp]=dky return dky end dko=0 dkl=dko dkp=dko dkp=dkp*25+(11644) dko=dkl+(dkm[618815*131071+dkp] or dkn(618815,3723,2994)) dkl=dko while true do if dkl==475162 then break end if dkl<568309 then if dkl<=27322 then if dkl==27322 then dkl=dko end else dkp=0 dkl=657633 end else if dkl==118999 then dkq=dki:XC51(dkj,dkq,dki:BIA73(dkj,dkj[1][61][2](dkk,dkj[17],dkj[17]),dkj[1][2][7]*dkr));dkj[17]=dkj[17]+1;dkp=dkp*26+(-893688) dkl=657633 end end else if dkl>631188 then if dkl==657633 then dko=dkm[dkp*131071+37] or dkl dkl=dko[4411] elseif dkl==657625 then dkr=dks dkp=dkp*8+(-262777) dko=dkl+(dkm[-681528*131071+dkp] or dkn(-681528,2727,3285)) dkl=dko else dkp=0 dkl=657633 end else if dkl==568309 then return dkq;elseif dkl==631188 then dkq=0 dks=0 dkt=dkj[1][22][7] dku=1 dkp=dkp*20+(-193560) dkl=dkl+(dkm[-12511*131071+dkp] or dkn(-12511,945,1317)) else dkp=0 dkl=657633 end end end end end,CU7E4=function(dkz,dla,dlb,dlc,dld) local dle,dlf,dlg,dlh,dli,dlj,dlk dlf={}
